programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon learns that Mamoru has become a soldier of the Dark Kingdom. She decides to take on Queen Beryl in an effort to get Mamoru back, but…

programme.title: Life of Crime, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Double-crosses and plot twists abound when a corrupt real-estate developer (Tim Robbins) decides not to pay a ransom to his wife's (Jennifer Aniston) kidnappers (John Hawkes, Yasiin Bey).

programme.title: One Day as a Lion, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Jackie Powers is a nice guy but a lousy hit man who takes a waitress hostage after a job goes bad. When Jackie reveals he needs money to get his son out of jail, she cooks up a scheme for them to get cash from her dying mother.

programme.title: War on Everyone, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Two corrupt cops, who make money blackmailing criminals, come up against one who may be far more dangerous than both of them.

programme.title: Mad Money, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Three women (Diane Keaton, Queen Latifah, Katie Holmes) conspire to steal a pile of cash that the Federal Reserve Bank has earmarked for destruction.

programme.title: Queenpins, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A housewife and her friend hatch an illegal coupon-club scheme that scams millions from corporations and delivers deals to the public. Hot on their trail is an unlikely duo -- a hapless loss-prevention officer and a determined U.S. postal inspector.

programme.title: Kin, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: On the run from a Detroit crime boss, an ex-con and his adopted brother use a high-tech gun to battle an army of thugs and two heavily armored, futuristic soldiers who want their weapon back.

programme.title: Push, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A 13-year-old clairvoyant (Dakota Fanning) and the son (Chris Evans) of a murdered assassin join forces against a covert government agency that dabbles in psychic drugs and warfare.

programme.title: The Giver, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A teen (Brenton Thwaites) discovers the dark truth about his community's secret past from an old man (Jeff Bridges) who is the sole keeper of their world's memories.

programme.title: Voyagers, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: With the future of the human race at stake, a group of young men and women embark on an expedition to colonize a distant planet. As life on the ship descends into chaos, they soon become consumed by fear, lust and an insatiable hunger for power.

programme.title: Kin, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: On the run from a Detroit crime boss, an ex-con and his adopted brother use a high-tech gun to battle an army of thugs and two heavily armored, futuristic soldiers who want their weapon back.

programme.title: The Monuments Men, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: THE MONUMENTS MEN centers around an unlikely World War II platoon, tasked with going into Germany to rescue artistic masterpieces from Nazi thieves and returning them to their rightful owners.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button, (2008, Drama)
programme.desc: Brad Pitt and Cate Blanchett star in the adaption of F. Scott Fitzgerald's story about an elderly man who ages backward and the problems that arise when he falls in love with a woman.

programme.title: Bandits, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: Legally Blonde, (2001, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Elle Woods has it all, but when her boyfriend goes to Harvard, Ellie rallies all her resources to get into Harvard Law. But law school is a far cry from the comforts of home. Elle must wage the battle of her life, for herself and for all blondes!

programme.title: Pacific Heights, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: A couple work hard to renovate their dream house and become landlords to pay for it. Unfortunately, one of their tenants has plans of his own.

programme.title: Grace Of Monaco, (2015, Drama)
programme.desc: Academy Award®-winner Nicole Kidman captures the beauty and elegance of Grace Kelly in this true story of her transition from Hollywood starlet to Princess of Monaco.

programme.title: The Peacemaker, (1996, Action)
programme.desc: When a train carrying atomic warheads crashes in the Soviet Union, nuclear specialist Dr. Kelly discovers the accident is really part of a plot to cover up the theft of the weapons.

programme.title: Nine, (2009, Musical)
programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of the musical inspired by the Fellini film "8½".

programme.title: Reborn to Master the Blade: From Hero-King to Extraordinary Squire

programme.title: Sleepy Princess in the Demon Castle
programme.desc: As Dawner the Hero faces perilous obstacles to rescue Princess Syalis, the princess continues to find creative ways to sleep more comfortably in the Demon Castle.

programme.title: Sleepy Princess in the Demon Castle
programme.desc: Princess Syalis meddles with forbidden magical items and causes total mayhem for the Demon Castle.

programme.title: Sleepy Princess in the Demon Castle
programme.desc: Fed up with her circumstances at the Demon Castle, Princess Syalis goes to great lengths to add luxuries to her castle prison.

programme.title: Sleepy Princess in the Demon Castle
programme.desc: The female unit, long deployed in the field, returns to the Demon Castle to get their first taste of Princess Syalis.

programme.title: Sleepy Princess in the Demon Castle
programme.desc: Dawner the Hero has more trouble than expected on his journey to the Demon Castle, so the demon higher-ups decide to take some action.

programme.title: Taisho Otome Fairy Tale

programme.desc: 2023. Freddy é o herdeiro de uma família de lobisomens e tem certeza que vai virar um lobo incrível. Mas algo dá errado em sua primeira tranformação e ele vira um feroz poodle. programme.title: O Menino e o Urso, (2014)

programme.desc: 2009. No trabalho o Capitão Caleb vive pelo velho ditado dos bombeiros: Nunca deixe o seu companheiro para trás. Em casa, ele vive pelas próprias regras. programme.title: A Conquista da Sibéria, (1970)

programme.title: Conexão Mortal, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um misterioso sinal de celular transforma humanos em criaturas sanguinárias. Um homem que sobreviveu à epidemia está determinado a encontrar sua família em meio ao caos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: 6 Balas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após uma missão de resgate mal-sucedida, o mercenário Samson Gália decide abandonar tudo, até ser chamado para uma última missão cujo objetivo é resgatar a filha de um lutador de MMA muito conhecido. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Forças Malignas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. De férias no Camboja, Ben conhece Amber e os dois passam vivem uma intenção paixão. Porém, as férias perfeitas se tornam um pesadelo quando uma entidade maligna começa assombrar a garota, que aos poucos revela um passado sombrio. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Teia de Corrupção, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O lutador Liam sai da prisão com o único desejo de reatar o laço com seu filho. Mas, quando seu irmão se envolve com criminosos de alto escalão, ele não vê alternativa a não ser se arriscar novamente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Beleza Fantástica, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um conto de fadas contemporâneo sobre o surgimento de uma amizade improvável entre uma jovem solitária que sonha ser autora de livros infantis e um viúvo rabugento. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Menina e o Leão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mia é uma jovem de 14 anos que sempre teve uma profunda amizade com Charlie, um leão branco da fazenda de sua família. Um dia, seu pai decide vender o felino para caçadores de troféus e ela não vê outra opção além de fugir com Charlie para salvá-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Norman - Confie em Mim, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Norman Oppenheimer é um picareta do mercado financeiro que tenta sua sorte na cidade de Nova York. Tentando ser amigo de todos, ele força seu caminho até se infiltrar no círculo interno de ricaços e de figurões da política. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Última Jornada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Com o fim do mundo se aproximando, uma mãe prestes a morrer envia seu filho a uma jornada a um lugar místico que realiza desejos, na esperança que ele possa salvar o mundo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Recomeço, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Murphy machucou gravemente seu joelho em uma partida que definiria sua carreira. Um dia, quinze anos mais tarde, ele é levado de volta ao passado e tem a oportunidade de reconstruir sua história como sempre sonhou. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Deixados para Trás III - Mundo em Guerra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No mundo profetizado do Livro da Revelação, o mundo está em paz. Porém, uma tentativa frustrada de assassinato contra o presidente norte-americano aponta para uma conspiração que pretende fazer com que a 3ª Guerra Mundial aconteça o quanto antes. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Em Retirada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um típico adolescente da cidade viaja atá a rural Montana para caçar com o pai, um homem distante e pouco convencional. Conforme adentram na paisagem, eles tentam se aproximar de alguma maneira. Até que um encontro brutal com um urso pardo muda tudo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Rei da Escócia, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Robert the Bruce é coroado rei da Escócia livre. Mas os ingleses estão determinados a recuperar seu território perdido. Batalha após batalha, Robert é derrotado e a nobreza lhe dá as costas. Entretanto, ele retorna para conquistar o que é seu. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Marca da Forca, (1968)
programme.desc: 1968. Eles o cravaram de balas. Eles o penduraram pelo pescoço. Eles o deixaram para morrer. Mas eles cometeram dois erros fatais: eles tentaram enforcar o homem errado, e não terminaram o trabalho. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Clint Eastwood, Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle Diretor: Ted Post

programme.title: Meu nome é Ninguém, (1975)
programme.desc: 1975. Um jovem pistoleiro descontraído idolatra e compete com um famoso pistoleiro, insistindo que precisa enfrentar um bando de 150 foras da lei antes de poder se aposentar. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Terence Hill, Henry Fonda, Jean Martin Diretor: Tonino Valerii

programme.title: A Morte Anda a Cavalo, (1967)
programme.desc: 1967. Bill Meceita testemunha o assassinato de sua família quando criança e cresce com desejo de vingança. Ele se une a Ryan, um pistoleiro, e saem à procura do bandido Walcot, mas ele logo descobre que Ryan esconde um segredo sobre o seu passado. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Anthony Dawson, Carlo Pisacane, Franco Balducci, John Phillip Law, José Torres, Lee Van Cleef, Luigi Pistilli, Mario Brega Diretor: Giulio Petroni

programme.title: Marcado pela Vingança, (1972)
programme.desc: 1972. Vaqueiro vê a família ser massacrada por bando de índios e ladrões de cavalos, liderados por dois homens brancos, que fogem para o México e escapam da polícia americana. O vaqueiro arregimenta seis fugitivos da prisão e parte para a vingança. programme.title: Terra Bruta, (1961)
programme.desc: 1961. Pela primeira vez, o lendário John Ford une-se à estrela James Stewart em - Terra Bruta, que relata a história tensa e emocionante de dois homens da lei que invadem o território dos Comanches para resgatar reféns cativos da tribo. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Andy Devine, Harry Carey Jr., Henry Brandon, James Stewart, John Mcintire, Linda Cristal, Olive Carey, Paul Birch, Richard Widmark, Shirley Jones Diretor: John Ford

programme.title: A Noite da Emboscada, (1968)

programme.title: O Último Samurai do Oeste, (1973)

programme.desc: 1970. Alex Danyliuk passa a ter problemas financeiros em sua família e busca no crime uma solução para a situação. Com a ajuda de criminoso virtual, ele passa a roubar a identidade das pessoas e a cometer pequenos desvios de dinheiro. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Código de Honra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O coronel Robert Sikes tem uma missão: livrar sua cidade do crime. Ele faz de tudo para conseguir alcançar seus objetivos, mas para isso precisa enfrentar seu antigo aprendiz, que deseja prendê-lo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Lejos de la tierra quemada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Cinco pessoas iniciam jornadas em busca de redenção e percebem que suas ações podem fazer a diferença entre viver ou morrer. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Último Guarda-Costas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um criminoso ganha a liberdade e decide se afastar da vida do crime. Ele aceita trabalhar para uma atriz famosa que há anos não sai de sua mansão. No entanto, um poderoso mafioso obriga o ex-bandido a trabalhar para ele. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Adorável Professora, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma professora reencontra seu antigo aluno, Jason, que sonha em ser autor de teatro. Para ajudá-lo, Linda resolve encenar a peça escrita por ele na escola em que trabalha. A parti daí, ela começa a perceber que sente algo mais por Jason. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Química do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma dedicada cientista, determinada a resolver a guerra dos sexos, arrisca sua própria felicidade para provar que a ciência explica tudo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Filha de Deus, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O detetive Scott Galban busca a verdade sobre a misteriosa morte de seu parceiro. Enquanto isso, Isabel de la Cruz, uma mulher local que diz ter sido testemunha de um milagre, começa a vivenciar estranhos acontecimentos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Última Jornada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Com o fim do mundo se aproximando, uma mãe prestes a morrer envia seu filho a uma jornada a um lugar místico que realiza desejos, na esperança que ele possa salvar o mundo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Dono da Festa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Van Wilder ficou famoso na cidade por organizar as melhores festas da faculdade. Porém, o veterano é forçado a mudar sua rotina de sete anos após perder a mesada do pai, deixando as festividades com os dias contados. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Entrando numa Roubada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Vitor vence um concurso de roteiros e ganha como prêmio R$ 100 mil para produzir um filme. Ele procura seus antigos colegas para participar de "Aceleração Máxima", que conta com assaltos a postos de gasolina, tiros e perseguições no enredo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Reino Gelado 3 - Fogo e Gelo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O raro talento de se meter em problemas é o legado da família de Kai e Gerda. Crescidos, os irmãos se metem em um desastre de proporções globais, tudo para encontrar seus pais que estão desaparecidos após serem levados pelo Vento do Norte. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Esqueceram de Nós, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dois ladrões atrapalhados invadem a casa de um inventor para roubar sua última criação. Mas os cães da vizinhança estão a postos para defender o território. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Faça um Desejo!, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Quatro crianças descobrem uma criatura mágica que concede desejos em uma viagem à praia. Elas só não imaginavam que o vizinho esquisitão da casa ao lado também está de olho nesses poderes. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Agente Mirim, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Quando sua mãe viaja, Olívia fica sob os cuidados do seu irmão mais velho, Miles. Quando Olivia testemunha um sequestro, ninguém acredita nela, nem mesmo seu irmão. Determinada a provar seu valor, a pequena decide investigar o crime por si só. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Eterna Namorada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Big Stone Gap é o lar de personagens charmosos e excêntricos. Ave Maria Mulligan, uma farmacêutica de 35 anos, é a solteirona da cidade. A vida de Ave vira de cabeça para baixo depois que ela descobre um segredo de família. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Vida em Espera, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O colapso nervoso de um homem faz com que ele deixe a esposa e viva no sótão por vários meses. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Apenas Amigos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ao visitar sua cidade natal durante o Natal, um executivo fica cara a cara com sua antiga paixão do ensino médio, de quem era o melhor amigo - uma mulher cuja rejeição a ele o transformou em um mulherengo feroz. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Força Maior, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante as férias nos Alpes Suíços, uma família é surpreendida por uma avalanche de neve que se aproxima. Desesperado, o pai, Tomás, age impulsivamente e coloca em risco a segurança do seu casamento e também o relacionamento com seus filhos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 1988. Afinal, quem sou eu? A chave é o homem misterioso que aparece em Shinshu, no tempo de Togakushi. Quem é o Akunobou Sugitani que esconde-se em meio à montanha? programme.title: 1988. Morgana e Dokosai planejam um atentado para acabar com Jiraya e finalmente destruir o Deus Jirai. Para isso eles sequestram Kasumi e a usam para conseguirem o que querem. Oruha se vê obrigada a obedecer as forças do mal para salvar a irmã. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura

programme.title: 1985. O cozinheiro espacial Bragul e Macgaren se unem para raptar Miya e atrair Jaspion para uma emboscada. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E37

programme.title: 1985. Miki é uma menina com poderes sobrenaturais. Resgatada por Macgaren de um desmoronamento ela é pressionada a ajudá-lo. Macgaren usa o poder de Miki para corromper os cidadãos da vila. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo

programme.title: 1985. A irmã da bruxa Kilza, Kilmaza, surge com os ninjas espaciais e põe em prática seu plano de fazer as pessoas odiarem Jaspion. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo

programme.title: 1985. Kilmaza implanta diamantes falsos na terra para corromper o coração das pessoas e trazer caos ao país Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo

programme.title: 1985. John Tiger é um ex-assassino profissional e amigo de infância de Jaspion. programme.title: 1985. Durante uma viagem espacial, os cientistas do planeta Brain Dr. Pab, Dra. Mam e seu filho Pep são raptados pelo Sindicato da Treva Galáctica ao mando de Kilmaza. programme.title: 1997. Cartman conta para seus amigos sobre o seu sonho em que apareciam uns alienígenas que o abduzem e lhe introduzem uma sonda anal. programme.desc: South Park - T01E01

Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E06

programme.title: 1997. Kenny é esmagado pela Estação Espacial Mir e se transforma em um zumbi que dá início a uma enorme epidemia. programme.desc: South Park - T01E07

programme.title: 1997. Os rapazes encontram um objeto misterioso em uma escavação escolar e saem no jornal. programme.desc: South Park - T02E14

programme.title: 1999. Vários habitantes de South Park estão ficando cada vez mais furiosos, e sem alguma razão aparente. programme.desc: South Park - T03E02

programme.title: 1999. Cartman, Kyle e Stan enganam Tweek e Craig para que eles lutem um contra o outro. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E04

programme.title: 1999. A mãe de Cartman dá um presente para ajudá-lo a ganhar o concurso de soletrar. Trata-se de um "macaco da fonética". Neste concurso, os rapazes conhecem Marc e Rebecca, dois irmãos que não vão para a escola, pois estudam em suas casas. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E13

programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. programme.title: 2001. Cartman encontra um carregamento cheio de fetos abortados após o tombamento de um caminhão em um barranco. programme.sub-title: O Treinamento Continua: Estoure O Balão Da Água!

programme.desc: Naruto: Atacar! A Fúria Do Rasengan! - T01E94

programme.desc: Naruto: Sensei E O Aluno: O Laço Dos Shinobi! - T01E100

programme.desc: Naruto: Você Precisa Ver! Você Precisa Conhecer! O Verdadeiro Rosto Do Kakashi Sensei! - T01E101

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura recebem uma missão B e vão para a região vizinha, a Terra do Chá. Eles devem proteger os corredores numa corrida, que acontece a cada quatro anos durante o ritual cerimonial do Santuário Todoroki. Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: Missão: Ajudar Um Velho Amigo Na Terra Do Chá! - T01E102

programme.desc: Naruto: Corre, Idate, Corre ... A Ilha Nagi O Aguarda ! - T01E104

programme.title: 2020. Mesmo com a interferência de Aoi, Idate não para de correr. Idate não confia em ninguém ainda, e é revelado que durante a Prova Chunin, o irmão mais velho de Idate foi o examinador quem fez a décima pergunta. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Batalha Feroz Do Trovão Retumbante
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Batalha Feroz Do Trovão Retumbante - T01E105

programme.desc: Naruto: Um Convite Do Som. - T01E109

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Arco de Ao - T13E192

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E194

programme.title: 2023. Um cartomante arcano rouba o Enigma do Milênio, e Yugi precisa defendê-lo em um duelo para recuperá-lo! No entanto, não se trata de um simples advinho. programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E02

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E03

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E04

programme.title: The Proposal
programme.desc: When a book editor faces deportation back to Canada, she declares that she's actually engaged to her put-upon assistant, who she's tormented for years. Starring Sandra Bullock, Ryan Reynolds, Mary Steenburgen.

programme.title: The Matrix Revolutions
programme.desc: The human city of Zion defends itself against the massive invasion of the machines as Neo fights to end the war at another front while also opposing the rogue Agent Smith. Starring Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne, Carrie-Anne Moss.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Eager to transform her business after the stash house is hit, Raq overhauls her operation; Kanan is detained after a fight with Scrappy.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Lou's new artist showcase becomes the nexus of the rivalry between Raq and Unique; Kanan cooks up a drug-selling scheme with Marvin.

programme.title: Lie With Me
programme.desc: A young man (Eric Balfour) and woman (Lauren Lee Smith) enjoy sexual compatibility but have trouble communicating and helping each other with problems. Starring Eric Balfour, Lauren Lee Smith, Don Francks.

programme.title: Diamond Tongues
programme.desc: Edith dreams of being a successful actress, but cannot land any roles. When she can't figure out what she is doing wrong, she starts to mess everything up. Starring Leah Fay Goldstein, Nick Flanagan, Adam Gurfinkel.

programme.title: Long Life, Happiness and Prosperity
programme.desc: A child (Valerie Tian) unwittingly wreaks havoc around her when she tries magic spells to find a new husband for her divorced, overworked mother (Sandra Oh). Starring Sandra Oh, Valerie Tian, Tsai Chin.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The team goes on a routine mission to retrieve an Abnormal and take it to safety; the mission becomes anything but routine when they are forced to stage a bank heist in order to protect the public from harm.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla resurfaces, sending Helen an SOS from deep within the Colombian Highlands; Will doesn't believe he can be trusted, and he may be right.

programme.title: Spies in Disguise
programme.desc: Lance is a super cool and charming spy, and Walter invents the super cool gadgets that Lance uses. But when events take an unexpected turn, Walter and Lance suddenly have to rely on each other in a whole new way. Starring Will Smith, Tom Holland, Rashida Jones.

programme.title: Cats & Dogs
programme.desc: An eager beagle joins undercover canines on a mission to foil a feline plot to make all people allergic to dogs. Starring Jeff Goldblum, Elizabeth Perkins, Miriam Margolyes.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs 2: The Revenge of Kitty Galore
programme.desc: Felines and canines form an unprecedented alliance to protect themselves and their humans from a rogue cat who wants to turn the world into her personal scratching post. Starring James Marsden, Nick Nolte, Christina Applegate.

programme.title: Meditation Park
programme.desc: A dutiful wife and mother re-examines her veneration of her husband after she finds another woman's underwear in his laundry. Starring Sandra Oh, Liane Balaban, Tzi Ma.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Friends and former teammates (Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock) learn that age does not, necessarily, equal maturity when they reunite to honor the memory of their basketball coach. Starring Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: Lenny Feder moves his family back to his hometown to be with his old friends and finds out that he didn't leave the crazy life behind in Los Angeles. Starring Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Alicia Silverstone) plays matchmaker for teachers, transforms a bad dresser (Brittany Murphy) and examines her own existence. Starring Alicia Silverstone, Stacey Dash, Brittany Murphy.

programme.title: Hairspray
programme.desc: In the 1960s Baltimore a plump teen becomes an overnight celebrity after she wins a spot on a local dance program called "The Corny Collins Show." Starring John Travolta, Nikki Blonsky, Amanda Bynes.

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer
programme.desc: A multimedia poet (Mike Myers) falls for a San Francisco butcher (Nancy Travis) who may be a husband killer, and he may be next. Starring Mike Myers, Nancy Travis, Anthony LaPaglia.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Kanan and Marvin's side hustle goes awry; Raq seeks revenge for the attack on Scrappy; Jukebox suffers a devastating blow.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Kanan struggles after word gets back to Raq that he's behind the bad crack on the streets.

programme.title: Hurry Up Tomorrow
programme.desc: Plagued by insomnia, a musician gets pulled into a nightmarish odyssey with a stranger who begins to unravel the very core of his existence. Starring Jenna Ortega, Barry Keoghan, Riley Keough.

programme.title: Where the Truth Lies
programme.desc: An ambitious reporter (Alison Lohman) probes the reasons behind the sudden split of a 1950s comedy team (Kevin Bacon, Colin Firth). Starring Kevin Bacon, Colin Firth, Alison Lohman.

programme.title: Owning Mahowny
programme.desc: A casino manager preys on a compulsive gambler (Philip Seymour Hoffman) who had kept his obsession a secret from his girlfriend (Minnie Driver). Starring Philip Seymour Hoffman, Minnie Driver, Maury Chaykin.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Kate are hijacked by armed thugs while transporting Abnormals. But before the gunmen get what they want, an old Abnormal friend, seeking safe harbor, attaches itself to Kate, endowing her with superpowers.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Henry travel to the UK to follow up on a werewolf sighting and end up uncovering a dark connection to Henry's past and future.

programme.title: Still Mine
programme.desc: A farmer fights back when local authorities hamper his efforts to build a cottage for his dementia-stricken wife. Starring James Cromwell, Geneviève Bujold, Campbell Scott.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: In 1953 a professor (Julia Roberts) of art history challenges her female students (Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles) to re-examine the traditional roles of women. Starring Julia Roberts, Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: Cairo Time
programme.desc: During a vacation in Egypt, an unexpected love affair arises between a magazine editor (Patricia Clarkson) and her husband's former colleague (Alexander Siddig). Starring Patricia Clarkson, Alexander Siddig, Elena Anaya.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: An ancient mask transforms a drab bank clerk (Jim Carrey) into a grinning Romeo with superhuman powers. Starring Jim Carrey, Cameron Diaz, Peter Riegert.

programme.title: Geostorm
programme.desc: When the satellites designed to control the global climate start to attack Earth, it's a race to uncover the real threat before a worldwide Geostorm wipes out everything and everyone. Starring Gerard Butler, Jim Sturgess, Abbie Cornish.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An entrepreneur invites scientists (Sam Neill, Laura Dern), a mathematics theorist (Jeff Goldblum) and others to his jungle theme-park featuring dinosaurs regenerated from DNA. Starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after "Jurassic Park," mathematician Ian Malcolm ventures onto a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait. Starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: A difficult visit from her mother propels Sloane further toward Will; Richard attempts to appease Sloane's desire in a different, ill-fated way.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Maggie summons the courage to tell her parents and the police about the relationship with her high school teacher.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy and Nick scheme to meet in person and hope to win Dee Dee's approval, but when their plan goes disastrously wrong they'll be pushed to make an extreme choice in order to be together.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: While Gypsy and Nick are on the run, flashbacks to a much younger Dee Dee reveal how trauma with her own mother set her up for conflict with Gypsy.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy is excited to start over with Nick in Wisconsin, but their new life doesn't match the happily-ever-after she imagined, and her anxiety worsens as past transgressions begin to catch up with them.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy fights for her life by defending her actions, while Mel and Lacey realize that behind closed doors things were not always as they seemed.

programme.title: Come to Daddy
programme.desc: A privileged man-child arrives at the beautiful and remote coastal cabin of his estranged father, whom he hasn't seen in 30 years. He quickly discovers that not only is his dad a jerk, he also has a shady past that is rushing to catch up with him. Starring Elijah Wood, Stephen McHattie, Martin Donovan.

programme.title: Whale
programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community. Starring Timmy Masso, Grace George, Joe Martin.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Residents of a small fishing community in Newfoundland charm a doctor into becoming the town's full-time physician in order to secure a vital factory contract. Starring Brendan Gleeson, Taylor Kitsch, Liane Balaban.

programme.title: Goosebumps
programme.desc: Author R.L. Stine (Jack Black), his young daughter (Odeya Rush) and their new neighbor (Dylan Minnette) must save the day when the monsters from the "Goosebumps" books magically come to life. Starring Jack Black, Dylan Minnette, Odeya Rush.

programme.title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: Best friends Sonny and Sam meet Slappy, a mischievous dummy who brings his ghoulish friends back to life -- just in time for Halloween. As the town becomes overrun with monsters, the boys join forces to save Sonny's mom and foil Slappy's wicked plan. Starring Madison Iseman, Jeremy Ray Taylor, Wendi McLendon-Covey.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: A resourceful teen takes her younger sister's place in a brutal contest in which youths from each of 12 districts fight to the death on live television. Starring Jennifer Lawrence, Josh Hutcherson, Liam Hemsworth.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After their unprecedented victory in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and Peeta Mellark embark on a Victors Tour. Katniss senses rebellion is stirring, but a cruel change in the upcoming 75th Hunger Games may change Panem forever. Starring Jennifer Lawrence, Josh Hutcherson, Liam Hemsworth.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After shattering the games forever, Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) finds herself in District 13, fighting to save Peeta (Josh Hutcherson) and a nation moved by her courage. Starring Jennifer Lawrence, Josh Hutcherson, Liam Hemsworth.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
programme.desc: Katniss faces mortal traps, deadly enemies and moral choices when she and her closest friends leave District 13 to assassinate President Snow and liberate the citizens of war-torn Panem. Starring Jennifer Lawrence, Josh Hutcherson, Liam Hemsworth.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: One fine day, Paddington spots a pop-up book in an antique shop, the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before her big celebration. Starring Ben Whishaw, Hugh Grant, Sally Hawkins.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The beloved Crawleys and their intrepid staff prepare for the most important moment of their lives. A royal visit from the king and queen of England soon unleashes scandal, romance and intrigue -- leaving the future of Downton hanging in the balance. Starring Hugh Bonneville, Jim Carter, Michelle Dockery.

programme.title: Maudie
programme.desc: From childhood to her deathbed, a woman experiences love, loss and discrimination. Starring Patricia Ann Hoffman, Meberate Brooks, Kayla Monnot-Edwards.

programme.title: Goon
programme.desc: Though a misfit among his brainy family members, Massachusetts bouncer Doug Glatt has a knockout punch that lands him a spot on a minor-league Canadian hockey team. Starring Seann William Scott, Jay Baruchel, Alison Pill.

programme.title: Welcome to Hard Times
programme.desc: A mayor's cowardice allows an outlaw to ride roughshod over the citizens of a desolate frontier town. Starring Henry Fonda, Janice Rule, Aldo Ray.

programme.title: Ed Wood
programme.desc: Edward D. Wood Jr. (Johnny Depp) directs awful '50s cult films like Glen or Glenda and Plan 9 From Outer Space. Starring Johnny Depp, Martin Landau, Sarah Jessica Parker.

programme.title: The Great Ziegfeld
programme.desc: The life and times of Broadway showman Florenz Ziegfeld and his two wives. Starring William Powell, Luise Rainer, Myrna Loy.

programme.title: Too Much, Too Soon
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography of Diana Barrymore (Dorothy Malone), the troubled daughter of actor John Barrymore (Errol Flynn). Starring Dorothy Malone, Errol Flynn, Efrem Zimbalist Jr..

programme.title: The George Raft Story
programme.desc: A Broadway dancer (Ray Danton) goes to Hollywood and begins his movie career as a gangster in "Scarface." Starring Ray Danton, Jayne Mansfield, Julie London.

programme.title: The Actress
programme.desc: Supported by her mother, a New Englander (Jean Simmons) finally tells her salty father (Spencer Tracy) she wants to be an actress. Starring Spencer Tracy, Jean Simmons, Anthony Perkins.

programme.title: The Phenix City Story
programme.desc: The son (Richard Kiley) of an ill-fated anti-crime crusader (John McIntire) tries to clean up his notorious Alabama hometown. Starring John McIntire, Richard Kiley, Kathryn Grant.

programme.title: While The City Sleeps
programme.desc: Three New York newsmen use women (Ida Lupino, Rhonda Fleming) and a reporter (Dana Andrews) to find a so-called Lipstick Killer. Starring Dana Andrews, Ida Lupino, Rhonda Fleming.

programme.title: We Who Are About to Die
programme.desc: An innocent man (John Beal) sits on death row in colorful company, as friends (Preston Foster, Ann Dvorak) race to save his life. Starring Preston Foster, Ann Dvorak, John Beal.

programme.title: Badlands
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking teenage girl joins a garbage man on a South Dakota killing spree. Starring Martin Sheen, Sissy Spacek, Warren Oates.

programme.title: Blanche Fury
programme.desc: A Victorian governess (Valerie Hobson) marries an English heir, then plots with a stableboy (Stewart Granger) to kill him. Starring Stewart Granger, Valerie Hobson, Walter Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Madeleine
programme.desc: Upper-class Madeleine Smith (Ann Todd) stands trial for killing her French lover (Ivan Desny) in Victorian Scotland. Starring Ann Todd, Norman Wooland, Ivan Desny.

programme.title: Agatha
programme.desc: A U.S. reporter (Dustin Hoffman) joins the search for writer Agatha Christie (Vanessa Redgrave), lost for 11 days in 1926. Starring Dustin Hoffman, Vanessa Redgrave, Timothy Dalton.

programme.title: The Mating Season
programme.desc: An honest working woman (Thelma Ritter) poses as a maid in the home of her son (John Lund) who has married a socialite (Gene Tierney). Starring Gene Tierney, John Lund, Thelma Ritter.

programme.title: The Cincinnati Kid
programme.desc: An upstart card shark has a marathon game with the king of stud poker in the 1930s New Orleans. Starring Steve McQueen, Edward G. Robinson, Ann-Margret.

programme.title: Gumshoe
programme.desc: A Liverpool private eye (Albert Finney) works on a case confused by his sister-in-law (Billie Whitelaw) and brother (Frank Finlay). Starring Albert Finney, Billie Whitelaw, Frank Finlay.

programme.title: The Last of Sheila
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer (James Coburn) shares his Riviera yacht with six people who might have killed his wife. Starring James Coburn, Dyan Cannon, Richard Benjamin.

programme.title: After the Thin Man
programme.desc: Urbane Nick and Nora Charles (William Powell, Myrna Loy) look for a cousin's missing husband and find murder. Starring William Powell, Myrna Loy, James Stewart.

programme.title: Midnight Mary
programme.desc: A woman (Loretta Young) recalls a gangster (Ricardo Cortez) and a lawyer (Franchot Tone) in her life while on trial for murder. Starring Loretta Young, Ricardo Cortez, Franchot Tone.

programme.title: Mandalay
programme.desc: A gunrunner's (Ricardo Cortez) girlfriend (Kay Francis) meets a drunken doctor (Lyle Talbot) in a Rangoon bar, where she sings. Starring Kay Francis, Ricardo Cortez, Lyle Talbot.

programme.title: The Divorcee
programme.desc: Old flames and new jealousies compel a married woman to leave her husband and embark on a series of romances. Starring Norma Shearer, Chester Morris, Conrad Nagel.

programme.title: The Easiest Way
programme.desc: A poor store worker (Constance Bennett) becomes one man's (Adolphe Menjou) mistress and another man's (Robert Montgomery) lover. Starring Constance Bennett, Adolphe Menjou, Robert Montgomery.

programme.title: The Reckless Hour
programme.desc: An artist (Conrad Nagel) restores an embittered model's (Dorothy Mackaill) faith in men after a cad (Walter Byron) abandons her with child. Starring Dorothy Mackaill, Conrad Nagel, Walter Byron.

programme.title: Beauty for Sale
programme.desc: Beauty-shop workers gossip and dream of meeting eligible men. Starring Madge Evans, Alice Brady, Otto Kruger.

programme.title: Blondie Johnson
programme.desc: The death of her mother drives a bitter blonde (Joan Blondell) to a life of crime that ends with prison. Starring Joan Blondell, Chester Morris, Allen Jenkins.

programme.title: Frisco Jenny
programme.desc: A Barbary Coast madam's (Ruth Chatterton) illegitimate son (Donald Cook), a district attorney, tries her for murder. Starring Ruth Chatterton, Donald Cook, James Murray.

programme.title: Red Headed Woman
programme.desc: A gold digger (Jean Harlow) breaks up her boss's (Chester Morris) marriage and sins her way to financial success. Starring Jean Harlow, Chester Morris, Una Merkel.

programme.title: Baby Face
programme.desc: An out-of-town working girl (Barbara Stanwyck) rises in a New York bank by using her power over men. Starring Barbara Stanwyck, George Brent, Donald Cook.

programme.title: Mirage
programme.desc: An amnesiac (Gregory Peck) roams New York, seeking his identity, and finds he is a target for assassins. Starring Gregory Peck, Diane Baker, Walter Matthau.

programme.title: Arabesque
programme.desc: A U.S. professor (Gregory Peck) at Oxford turns spy with the mistress (Sophia Loren) of a plotting Arab oilman (Alan Badel). Starring Gregory Peck, Sophia Loren, Alan Badel.

programme.title: The Man in the Gray Flannel Suit
programme.desc: A World War II veteran (Gregory Peck) can either rise on Madison Avenue or be with his wife (Jennifer Jones) and family. Starring Gregory Peck, Jennifer Jones, Fredric March.

programme.title: Designing Woman
programme.desc: A married sportswriter (Gregory Peck) and fashion designer (Lauren Bacall) have clashing friends. Starring Gregory Peck, Lauren Bacall, Dolores Gray.

programme.title: The Snows of Kilimanjaro
programme.desc: The life of celebrated American writer Harry Street (Gregory Peck) flashes back before his eyes as he lies dying from a wound suffered at the foot of Tanzania's Mount Kilimanjaro. Starring Gregory Peck, Susan Hayward, Ava Gardner.

programme.title: The Great Sinner
programme.desc: A lucky writer (Gregory Peck) tries to get his girlfriend (Ava Gardner) and her gambler father out of debt to a casino owner (Melvyn Douglas). Starring Gregory Peck, Ava Gardner, Melvyn Douglas.

programme.title: Alice in Movieland
programme.desc: Alice wins a free trip to Hollywood and dreams about her arrival. Starring Joan Leslie, Nana Bryant, Clara Blandick.

programme.title: Batman and Robin
programme.desc: A supervillian called the Wizard threatens Gotham City.

programme.title: Tarzan Goes to India
programme.desc: A dam is built to provide water for an Indian valley, but the resulting floods threaten to wipe out a herd of elephants. Tarzan swings in to save the animals, but the water levels are already rising. Starring Jock Mahoney, Jai, the Elephant Boy, Leo Gordon.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Bugs and his orchestra's performance is thrown into disarray when a troublesome fly buzzes its way into the concert venue and keeps hovering around.

programme.title: Fashions of 1934
programme.desc: Caught in Paris, a fashion thief (William Powell) and his helpers (Bette Davis, Frank McHugh) put on a show. Starring William Powell, Bette Davis, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: The Glass Bottom Boat
programme.desc: Spies follow a PR woman (Doris Day) who works for a space scientist (Rod Taylor) and whose father (Arthur Godfrey) runs a sightseeing boat. Starring Doris Day, Rod Taylor, Arthur Godfrey.

programme.title: The Crimson Pirate
programme.desc: An acrobatic pirate (Burt Lancaster) and his sidekick (Nick Cravat) help Caribbean rebels fight Spain with an inventor's weapons. Starring Burt Lancaster, Nick Cravat, Eva Bartok.

programme.title: They Were Expendable
programme.desc: Heroic PT boat captains (Robert Montgomery, John Wayne) fight Japanese ships in the World War II Philippines. Starring Robert Montgomery, John Wayne, Donna Reed.

programme.title: To Sir, With Love
programme.desc: Unable to find employment in his field, a black engineer accepts a teaching position in a tough East End London school. Starring Sidney Poitier, Judy Geeson, Christian Roberts.

programme.title: A Piece of the Action
programme.desc: Two con men (Sidney Poitier, Bill Cosby) are persuaded by a retired policeman (James Earl Jones) to volunteer their services to a ghetto youth center. Starring Sidney Poitier, Bill Cosby, James Earl Jones.

programme.title: Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: A psychopath (Robert Walker) and a tennis player (Farley Granger) meet in a club car and plot that each will murder someone for the other. Starring Robert Walker, Farley Granger, Ruth Roman.

programme.desc: A husband's plot to murder his unfaithful wife goes awry in Alfred Hitchcock's adaptation of the Frederick Knott play. Starring Ray Milland, Grace Kelly, Bob Cummings.

Starring Sonya Walger, Hayley Erin, Tony Amendola.

programme.desc: Ted and Amanda's hard work leads to Jong Min's remains being found in the river; Amanda is convinced there's a link between this death and that of her friend, Lars.

programme.title: The Lie: The Murder of Grace Millane
programme.desc: The headline-grabbing murder of 21-year-old British backpacker Grace Millane while on a solo holiday in New Zealand.

programme.title: Please, After You
programme.desc: Ali's life in Canada as a newcomer is shaken when his naive cousin Omid arrives unexpectedly from overseas. His arrival sets off a tide of misadventures threatening to cost him his cherished ambitions and driving him to wits end. Starring Sammy Azero, Neema Nazeri, Juno Rinaldi.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Tom Bragg's sudden death raises questions, especially when his wife's hidden motives come to light; as investigators dig deeper, disturbing secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: Diving into the world of dating apps, a lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention in his profile. Starring Stephanie Sy, Jacob Blair, Erik Athavale.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: When a retired city bureaucrat turned bank robber is finally arrested, a long distance friend is stunned to see his familiar face online in connection with a high-speed chase and a string of armed bank robberies.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: When a student meets an esteemed psychologist, she's certain she's found her soul mate; when he suddenly disappears, she discovers he has been living a bizarre double life in Detroit's most notorious neighborhood.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A husband and wife take a cruise to celebrate their good luck in business, but their luck takes a turn at the apex of their journey, with many wondering what happened aboard the ship.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: Newlyweds board a cruise ship, but things take a turn for the worse when one disappears in the middle of the night; a blood stained canopy is all the only sign of a young man's fate; leaving many more questions than answers to what happened.

programme.title: Desire: A Temptations Story
programme.desc: Caught up in a whirlwind romance, inspirational talk-show host Kendra spontaneously marries the man of her dreams. However, once the honeymoon is over, revelations about her new husband's past lead her down a dangerous road. Starring Tasha Smith, Adrian Holmes, Millan Tesfazgi.

programme.title: Fame: A Temptations Story
programme.desc: Despite sibling rivalry, the Jordan sisters, Cherish and Roxy, remain the hottest singing duo on the charts. When their penthouse becomes the target of a jewel heist, rumors start to spread that Roxy secretly planned and staged the crime. Starring Keri Hilson, Keisha Chante, Nathan Witte.

programme.title: Exhibiting Forgiveness
programme.desc: A Black artist finds his path to success derailed by an unexpected visit from his estranged father, a recovering addict desperate to reconcile. Together, they learn that forgetting might be harder than forgiving. Starring André Holland, John Earl Jelks, Andra Day.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: Diving into the world of dating apps, a lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention in his profile. Starring Stephanie Sy, Jacob Blair, Erik Athavale.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A husband and wife take a cruise to celebrate their good luck in business, but their luck takes a turn at the apex of their journey, with many wondering what happened aboard the ship.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers

programme.desc: When a retired city bureaucrat turned bank robber is finally arrested, a long distance friend is stunned to see his familiar face online in connection with a high-speed chase and a string of armed bank robberies.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: When a student meets an esteemed psychologist, she's certain she's found her soul mate; when he suddenly disappears, she discovers he has been living a bizarre double life in Detroit's most notorious neighborhood.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Nashville, Mich., Rodney Fancher's bullet-ridden body is found in a ditch; the hunt for a killer begins, pulling in police forces from across the state; as the case starts to turn cold, a startling confession emerges.

programme.title: Stockholm Bloodbath
programme.desc: A ruthless political struggle between Sweden and Denmark turns bloody under the tyranny of the mad King Christian II. Caught up in this deadly war, two sisters seek revenge on the men who brutally murdered their family. Starring Sophie Cookson, Claes Bang, Alba August.

programme.title: McVeigh
programme.desc: After the deadly siege in Waco, Texas, U.S. Army veteran Timothy McVeigh hatches a sinister plan to blow up the Alfred P. Murrah Federal Building in Oklahoma City. Starring Alfie Allen, Brett Gelman, Ashley Benson.

programme.title: Stockholm Bloodbath
programme.desc: A ruthless political struggle between Sweden and Denmark turns bloody under the tyranny of the mad King Christian II. Caught up in this deadly war, two sisters seek revenge on the men who brutally murdered their family. Starring Sophie Cookson, Claes Bang, Alba August.

programme.title: McVeigh
programme.desc: After the deadly siege in Waco, Texas, U.S. Army veteran Timothy McVeigh hatches a sinister plan to blow up the Alfred P. Murrah Federal Building in Oklahoma City. Starring Alfie Allen, Brett Gelman, Ashley Benson.

programme.title: Mass
programme.desc: Two couples meet for a painful and raw conversation in the aftermath of a violent tragedy. Starring Reed Birney, Ann Dowd, Jason Isaacs.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: A carjacking murder is far more than it appears when police piece together surveillance videos and track the killer who parked the car and walked away.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: When Donald Hartung learns of his mother and brother's deaths, his reaction is flat, leading authorities to refuse to accept that he wasn't already aware of their murder.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Police questions Stephen after he speaks to news outlets about the search for a woman missing from his building; when Stephen appears to shut down completely, the challenge moves from looking for a confession to trying to get him to speak at all.

programme.title: Happy Clothes: A Film About Patricia Field
programme.desc: Showcases the life, work and legacy of Patricia Field, an Emmy Award-winning costume designer behind "Sex and the City," "Emily in Paris" and "The Devil Wears Prada."

programme.title: American Underdog
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Starring Zachary Levi, Anna Paquin, Dennis Quaid.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: A carjacking murder is far more than it appears when police piece together surveillance videos and track the killer who parked the car and walked away.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: When Donald Hartung learns of his mother and brother's deaths, his reaction is flat, leading authorities to refuse to accept that he wasn't already aware of their murder.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Police questions Stephen after he speaks to news outlets about the search for a woman missing from his building; when Stephen appears to shut down completely, the challenge moves from looking for a confession to trying to get him to speak at all.

programme.title: Happy Clothes: A Film About Patricia Field
programme.desc: Showcases the life, work and legacy of Patricia Field, an Emmy Award-winning costume designer behind "Sex and the City," "Emily in Paris" and "The Devil Wears Prada."

programme.title: Smart Home Killer
programme.desc: A single mother moves into a state-of-the-art smart house, complete with an in-home security system. However, as strange glitches and stranger events start to occur, she soon realizes that she's not the only one watching through her security cameras. Starring Natalie Brown, Anwen O'Driscoll, Athena Park.

programme.title: Exile
programme.desc: Just prior to his release from prison, Ted Evans receives a threat from the man whose family he killed in a DUI. Believing the danger is real, Ted lives a reclusive life to protect his family. Starring Adam Beach, Camille Sullivan, Garry Chalk.

programme.title: The Island Between Tides
programme.desc: A young woman follows a mysterious melody onto a remote tidal island. When she crosses back over at the next low tide, she emerges into a world where 25 years have passed. Starring Paloma Kwiatkowski, David Mazouz, Camille Sullivan.

programme.title: The Breach
programme.desc: Counting down his last days as chief of police in the tiny town of Lone Crow, John Hawkins must investigate one last case when a mangled body with uncanny wounds washes up on the shores of the Porcupine River. Starring Allan Hawco, Emily Alatalo, Natalie Brown.

programme.title: The Island Between Tides
programme.desc: A young woman follows a mysterious melody onto a remote tidal island. When she crosses back over at the next low tide, she emerges into a world where 25 years have passed. Starring Paloma Kwiatkowski, David Mazouz, Camille Sullivan.

programme.title: The Breach
programme.desc: Counting down his last days as chief of police in the tiny town of Lone Crow, John Hawkins must investigate one last case when a mangled body with uncanny wounds washes up on the shores of the Porcupine River. Starring Allan Hawco, Emily Alatalo, Natalie Brown.

programme.title: Psycho Therapy: The Shallow Tale of a Writer Who Decided to Write About a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A writer befriends a retired serial killer in a desperate attempt to find inspiration for his next novel and save his marriage. Covering as his marriage counselor, the killer teaches him his methods as reality becomes deadlier than fiction. Starring Steve Buscemi, John Magaro, Britt Lower.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Zandra Ducsay's end remained unsolved for years, but a new lead points to a suspect from her past, whose motives could finally explain what happened.
